Welcome to Quasi local measure’s handles documentation!

Browse through these pages for details on the functions in this module. Please contact vaishak@iucaa.in if you want to report any bugs or have comments/questions.

Indices and tables¶

  • Index

  • Module Index

  • Search Page

Handles main¶

qlm_handles.LegDecompSurface(data, inv_coords, twometric, it_num, out_every_it, info, lmax=8)¶

Decompose the given 2d quantity/data defined on the closed surface into Legendre spectrum by carrying out a sufacial integration.

Inputs:

  1. data (2d array) : 2d surfacial data preferrably as numpy array.

  2. inv_coord (1d array) : 1d array containing the invariant coordinate z.

  3. twometric (1d/2d array) : 1d/2d array containing the twometric on the two-surface.

  4. it_num (int) : The interation number of the data.

  5. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output.

  6. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

  7. lmax (int) : The maximum multipolar order to calculate upto.

  1. Moments (list) : The mass multipoles of the surfacial data upto l = 8.

qlm_handles.LegDecompSurfacePool_l(data, inv_coords, twometric, num_its, out_every_it, info, l=0)¶

For a multiprocessing pool worker. Decompose the given 2d quantity/data defined on the closed surface into Legendre spectrum for num_it number of iterations by carrying out a sufacial integration.

  1. data (2d array) : 2d surfacial data preferrably as numpy array.

  2. inv_coord (1d array) : 1d array containing the invariant coordinate z.

  3. twometric (1d/2d array) : 1d/2d array containing the twometric on the two-surface.

  4. num_its (int) : The number of interations to run the decompostition of the data for (0, num_its).

  5. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output.

  6. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

  7. l (int) : The multipolar order to run the decomposition for.

  1. lpole (float) : The lth order multipolar deocomposition of the surfacial data.

qlm_handles.LegDecompSurface_l(data, inv_coords, twometric, it_num, out_every_it, info, l=0)¶

Decompose the given 2d quantity/data defined on the closed surface into Legendre spectrum at a perticular iteration it_num by carrying out a sufacial integration.

1. data (2d array) : 2d surfacial data preferrably as numpy array. #2. coords (List) : List containing the coordinates corresponding to data list in the form [x,y]. 2. inv_coord (1d array) : 1d array containing the invariant coordinate z. 3. twometric (1d/2d array) : 1d/2d array containing the twometric on the two-surface. 4. it_num (int) : The interation number of the data. 5. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output. 6. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties. 7. l (int) : The multipolar order to calculate.

  1. lpole (float) : The mass multipole of the surfacial data of order l.

qlm_handles.LegDecompSurface_old(data, inv_coords, twometric, it_num, out_every_it, info, lmax=8)¶

Decompose the given 2d quantity/data defined on the closed surface into Legendre spectrum by carrying out a sufacial integration.

1. data (2d array) : 2d surfacial data preferrably as numpy array. #2. coords (List) : List containing the coordinates corresponding to data list in the form [x,y]. 2. inv_coord (1d array) : 1d array containing the invariant coordinate z. 3. twometric (1d/2d array) : 1d/2d array containing the twometric on the two-surface. 4. it_num (int) : The interation number of the data. 5. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output. 6. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties. 7. lmax (int) : The maximum multipolar order to calculate upto.

  1. Moments (list) : The mass multipoles of the surfacial data upto l = 8.

qlm_handles.MassMultipolePool_l(Rsci, zi, twometrici, num_its, out_every_it, Mh, Rh, info, l)¶

For a multiprocessing pool worker. Calculate the mass multipole moment. Decompose the given 2d Ricci scalar quantity/data defined on the closed surface into Legendre spectrum for num_it number of iterations by carrying out a sufacial integration.

  1. data (2d array) : 2d surfacial data preferrably as numpy array.

  2. inv_coord (1d array) : 1d array containing the invariant coordinate z.

  3. twometric (1d/2d array) : 1d/2d array containing the twometric on the two-surface.

  4. num_its (int) : The number of interations to run the decompostition of the data for (0, num_its).

  5. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output.

  6. Mh (1d) : The horizon mass.

  7. Rh (1d) : The horizon radius.

  8. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

  9. l (int) : The multipolar order to run the decomposition for.

  1. lpole (float) : The lth order multipolar deocomposition of the surfacial data.

qlm_handles.conv_1dto2d(data, coords, info)¶

Convert the given 1d data array of a 2d variable into a 2d array.

  1. data (1d) : The 2d data input as 1d array/list.

  2. coords (2d list) : List of pairs (x,y) coordinates of the corresponding index of data.

  3. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

reshaped_data (2d) : The reshaped data having shape (ntheta, nphi). conv_data (list) : Liat containing the coordinates and the reduced data in the form [x, y , reduced_dat_instance]

qlm_handles.data_of_it(data, it_num, out_every, info)¶

Return the data list belonging to the asked iteration number.

  1. data (1d) : 2d surfacial data in a 1d list.

  2. it_num (int) : Iteration number of the data to be returned.

  3. out_every (int) : The iteration period of output.

  4. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

  1. data_of_iter (1d) : The data belonging to the asked iteration.

qlm_handles.linenofromijact(it_num, i_act, j_act, out_every_it, info)¶

Returns the line number in the data file given the actual angular coordinate indices.

it_num (int) : The interation number of the data. i_act (int) : The actual ‘phi’ coordinate index that ranges from (0, nphi). j_act (int) : The actual ‘theta’ coordinate index that ranges from (0, ntheta). info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

lineno (int) : The line number that the actual coordinates correspond to in the data file.

qlm_handles.phi(j, info)¶

Returns the coordinate value theta given the coordinate index.

i (int) : The phi coordinate index. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

phi (float) : The coordinate theta.

class qlm_handles.surfacegridinfo(nphi=80, ntheta=41, nphimax=124, nthetamax=66, nghosts=2)¶

A class to store the theta-phi grid info.

qlm_handles.theta(i, info)¶

Returns the coordinate value theta given the coordinate index.

i (int) : The phi coordinate index. info (class instance) : The instance of the class that contains infomation about the 2d grid properties.

theta (float) : The coordinate theta.
